heading: Sense of Congress concerning participation by small business concerns
label: 720j Sense of Congress concerning participation by small business concerns
notes: Amendments2009—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which related to study to determine extent to which small business concerns participate in construction of oil and gas pipelines in the United States.Pub. L. 111–68
amendments: Amendments2009—Subsec. (c). struck out subsec. (c) which related to study to determine extent to which small business concerns participate in construction of oil and gas pipelines in the United States.Pub. L. 111–68

children.heading: Definition of small business concern
children.label: a Definition of small business concern
children.text: In this section, the term “small business concern” has the meaning given the term in .section 632(a) of this title
an Alaska natural gas transportation project would provide significant economic benefits to the United States and Canada; and

to maximize those benefits, the sponsors of the Alaska natural gas transportation project should maximize the participation of small business concerns in contracts and subcontracts awarded in carrying out the project.
